📅 6-Day Odyssey Itinerary

Day 1: Mytilene Arrival (~10km). Collect car and head to the city. Walk Ermou street and visit the massive Castle.
Day 2: The North (~65km). Stop at Thermi springs, lunch in Petra, and sunset in the medieval alleys of Molyvos.
Day 3: The Wild West (~70km). Drive to Sigri for the Petrified Forest, then stay overnight in the inclusive Skala Eressos.
Day 4: Inland Transition (~45km). Flamingos at Kalloni, the sacred Moni Limonos, and the stunning Agiasos mountain village. Base: Plomari.
Day 5: Deep South (~80km). Visit the raw Polichnitos springs and spend the day on the massive Vatera beach. No crowds, pure peace.
Day 6: Ouzo & Departure (~120km). Visit an ouzo distillery in Plomari, a final swim at Agios Isidoros, then head back to the airport.
💡 Why this placement works: Pairing Vatera with a Plomari base on Day 5 avoids backtracking and keeps the pace relaxed before your flight.
⚠️ Reality Check: Days 3 and 4 have the most intense mountain driving. Day 5 is your reward—a low-effort, high-reward coastal day.
